ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice associated with the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, packaged, shipped) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_amount" REAL /* Shipping amount for the order */,
  "shipping_provider" TEXT /* Shipping provider used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city of the order */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state of the order */,
  "shipping_zip" TEXT /* Shipping zip of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_provider FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("provider_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "item_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_category FOREIGN KEY ("item_category") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_subcategory FOREIGN KEY ("item_subcategory") REFERENCES item_subcategories ("subcategory_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item in the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the warehouse */,
  "available_space" REAL /* Available space in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the item in the warehouse */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity of the item in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping provider */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the shipping provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, warehouse manager, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)
